news.t: Vanguard Small-Cap ETF Ranked Best US SMID Cap Smart Beta ETFs

holdings.infoBox: PRFZ is an equity ETF with a total of 1526 individual holdings. The top holdings are TTM Technologies stock at 0.70%, MaxLinear at 0.58%, Viavi Solutions at 0.56%, Onto Innovation at 0.51%, and ATI Inc. at 0.51%.

overview.description: The Invesco RAFI US 1500 Small-Mid ETF (PRFZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE RAFI US 1500 Small-Mid index. The fund tracks a fundamentally-weighted index of 1,500 small- and mid-cap companies in the US that are selected using fundamental metrics. PRFZ was launched on Sep 20, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Vanguard Small-Cap ETF Ranked Best US SMID Cap Smart Beta ETFs
data.text: Q.ai's deep learning algorithms have identified several top US SMID Cap Smart Beta ETFs based on fund flows over the last 90-days, 30-days, and 7-days.
